message:
feat(prime): add role directives output to prime

Load and emit operator-provided role directives from directive files
(town-level and/or rig-level) during prime output.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -408,6 +408,7 @@ func outputRoleContext(ctx RoleContext) (string, error) {
 		return "", err
 	}
 
+	outputRoleDirectives(ctx)
 	outputContextFile(ctx)
 	outputHandoffContent(ctx)
 	outputAttachmentStatus(ctx)
